series_metadata.series_description: This series contians comlaint forms used to file complaints against licensees and non-licensed persons, along with investigative reports and procedures, notes, letters and evidence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for a period of five years. If complaints are non-chargeable, then destroy. For chargeable complaints, retain in office until a complete investigation or hearing is conducted and all appeals have been exhausted, then destroy after five years., Paper: Shred
